seoTitle: How to Create a Blog in Wix (Step by Step)
metaDescription: Learn how to install the Wix Blog app, set up categories, and publish your first post with proper SEO metadata.
intro: Adding a blog to your Wix site is a solid way to build organic traffic over time, and Wix's native blog app handles the layout and publishing workflow for you. This guide covers installing the app, organizing categories, drafting your first post, and setting up basic SEO metadata for it.

steps.heading: Open the App Market
steps.body: From your Wix editor, access the sidebar App Market to find the blogging tool.

steps.heading: Install the Wix Blog app
steps.body: Search for Wix Blog and complete the installation.

steps.heading: Choose your feed layout
steps.body: Select your preferred visual grid layout for the blog feed page.

steps.heading: Set up categories and author profiles
steps.body: Use the Blog Manager dashboard to organize content categories and administrative writer profiles.

steps.heading: Write your first post
steps.body: Click Create New Post to open the content editor and draft your article, formatting headers and embedding images as needed.

steps.heading: Add SEO details and preview
steps.body: Set the post's URL slug and meta title, check mobile scaling, and preview before publishing.

faq.question: Is the Wix Blog app free to install?
faq.answer: The core blogging app is available on Wix without an additional charge, though your overall site plan may affect certain features.

faq.question: Can I organize posts into categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the Blog Manager dashboard lets you set up categories and tags to organize your content.

faq.question: Should I set a custom URL slug for each post?
faq.answer: Yes, setting a clean, descriptive URL slug for each post helps with both readability and search engine visibility.

faq.question: Can multiple authors write for the same blog?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set up multiple administrative writer profiles within the Blog Manager.
